caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses speaks against a solid black background. She is wearing a light green, long-sleeved top featuring small red floral accents and a decorative neckline, complemented by a simple dark necklace. A small black lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her shirt. Throughout the sequence, she remains centered in the frame, speaking with subtle shifts in her facial expressions and head position. A small, circular logo containing the text "NPTEL" is visible in the bottom left corner of each frame. The woman's posture and gaze remain consistent as she communicates, with the only changes being the natural movements of her mouth and head as she speaks.
